subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Crown my head with the diadem of Thy love, illumine my breast with the light of Thy knowledge, and fill my heart with the radiant effulgences of the Day-Star of Thy recognition [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی زین رأسی باکلیل حبک و صدری بنور معرفتک و قلبی بتجلیات نیر عرفانک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for assistance; intercession, @prayer for protection, @spiritual transformation, @rejection, opposition and persecution
